title: andryala aestivalis
intro: Andryala aestivalis, also known as the Annual Andryala or Rock Andryala, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is a perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region, known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. The health benefits of Andryala aestivalis include its antimicrobial and antiviral properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues. Andryala aestivalis can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
